chunks.text: Each year the EECS Student Awards Committee selects winners for each of our department awards, many based on nominations gathered from EECS students, faculty and staff. The 2025-26 Student Award Nomination Period is Open. We invite nominations from EECS faculty, students, and staff for the EECS student awards. OGSI/EECS Outstanding TA Awards: Call for nominations open on Monday, 2/9/26; The deadline is 2/18/26. All other Department awards: Call for nominations will open on 2/20/26; The deadline is 3/5/26. Submit your nominations here. Nominate deserving students for this year’s student awards.
chunks.question: What are the nomination deadlines for EECS student awards in 2025-26?
chunks.answer: OGSI/EECS TA awards by 2/18/26, others by 3/5/26.

chunks.text: Compose a letter (approximately 1 page) for each nominee explaining your reason for recommending the student. Nominators should specifically address how the nominee meets the award criteria. Attach any relevant materials that will assist the Student Awards Committee in making their decision, such as publications, CVs, and additional letters of nomination. In addition to a letter, you may request the nominee to upload their resume and transcript to the nomination. Faculty support letters are highly recommended.
chunks.question: What should be included in an EECS award nomination?
chunks.answer: A one-page letter and supporting materials like CV.

chunks.text: The committee may seek additional information about the most promising nominees. Previous award recipients are ineligible to receive the same award again but may be recommended for any remaining awards. Nominators are encouraged to refer to the description of each award, which includes a list of previous awardees. Self-nominations with no nomination letter or supporting documentation are discouraged.
chunks.question: Can previous EECS award winners be nominated again?
chunks.answer: Not for the same award, but for others.

chunks.text: The following awards recognize and honor the ability and character of our students. Each award page includes a list of past awardees and a description of the award’s history and purpose. Demetri Angelakos Memorial Achievement Award, Timothy B. Campbell Innovation Award, Departmental Citation, Warren Y. Dere Design Award, EECS Outstanding TA Awards, Art and Mary Fong Undergraduate Scholarship, Jim and Donna Gray Endowment Award, Arthur M. Hopkin Award, Eli Jury Award, Eugene L. Lawler Prize, Tong Leong Lim Pre-Doctoral Prize, C.V. & Daulat Ramamoorthy Distinguished Research Award, Sevin Rosen Funds Award for Innovation, David J. Sakrison Memorial Prize, Samuel Silver Memorial Scholarship Award, Ross N. Tucker Memorial Award, James and Joyce Tullock Memorial Scholarship Award, Lotfi Zadeh Prize, CS Major Citation, EECS Major Citation.
chunks.question: What types of awards are listed for EECS students?
